scenario.name: Orders Customer Join
scenario.task_text:
Parse the JSON data containing two tables: "orders" (order_id, customer_id,
amount, status, order_date) and "customers" (id, name, email, plan).
Join orders to customers on customer_id = id. Filter to completed orders only.
Calculate total completed order amount per customer plan tier:
basic_revenue (sum of completed order amounts for basic plan customers),
pro_revenue (for pro plan), enterprise_revenue (for enterprise plan),
and total_completed (total completed orders count).

bricks.raw_response:
name: plan_revenue_summary
description: DSL-generated pipeline with 14 steps
inputs:
  raw_api_response: Any
steps:
- name: step_1_extract_json_from_str
  brick: extract_json_from_str
  params:
    text: ${inputs.raw_api_response}
  save_as: step_1_extract_json_from_str
- name: step_2_extract_dict_field
  brick: extract_dict_field
  params:
    data: ${step_1_extract_json_from_str.result}
    field: customers
  save_as: step_2_extract_dict_field
- name: step_3_for_each
  brick: __for_each__
  params:
    items: ${step_2_extract_dict_field.result}
    do_brick: rename_dict_keys
    item_kwarg: data
    static_kwargs:
      rename_map:
        id: customer_id
    item_paths: {}
    on_error: fail
  save_as: step_3_for_each
- name: step_4_map_values
  brick: map_values
  params:
    items: ${step_3_for_each.result}
    key: result
  save_as: step_4_map_values
- name: step_5_extract_dict_field
  brick: extract_dict_field
  params:
    data: ${step_1_extract_json_from_str.result}
    field: orders
  save_as: step_5_extract_dict_field
- name: step_6_join_lists_on_key
  brick: join_lists_on_key
  params:
    left: ${step_5_extract_dict_field.result}
    right: ${step_4_map_values.result}
    key: customer_id
  save_as: step_6_join_lists_on_key
- name: step_7_filter_dict_list
  brick: filter_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_6_join_lists_on_key.result}
    key: status
    value: completed
  save_as: step_7_filter_dict_list
- name: step_8_filter_dict_list
  brick: filter_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_7_filter_dict_list.result}
    key: plan
    value: pro
  save_as: step_8_filter_dict_list
- name: step_9_count_dict_list
  brick: count_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_7_filter_dict_list.result}
  save_as: step_9_count_dict_list
- name: step_10_calculate_aggregates
  brick: calculate_aggregates
  params:
    items: ${step_8_filter_dict_list.result}
    field: amount
    operation: sum
  save_as: step_10_calculate_aggregates
- name: step_11_filter_dict_list
  brick: filter_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_7_filter_dict_list.result}
    key: plan
    value: basic
  save_as: step_11_filter_dict_list
- name: step_12_calculate_aggregates
  brick: calculate_aggregates
  params:
    items: ${step_11_filter_dict_list.result}
    field: amount
    operation: sum
  save_as: step_12_calculate_aggregates
- name: step_13_filter_dict_list
  brick: filter_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_7_filter_dict_list.result}
    key: plan
    value: enterprise
  save_as: step_13_filter_dict_list
- name: step_14_calculate_aggregates
  brick: calculate_aggregates
  params:
    items: ${step_13_filter_dict_list.result}
    field: amount
    operation: sum
  save_as: step_14_calculate_aggregates
outputs_map:
  basic_revenue: ${step_12_calculate_aggregates.result}
  pro_revenue: ${step_10_calculate_aggregates.result}
  enterprise_revenue: ${step_14_calculate_aggregates.result}
  total_completed: ${step_9_count_dict_list.result}
bricks.dsl_code:
@flow
def plan_revenue_summary(raw_api_response):
    parsed             = step.extract_json_from_str(text=raw_api_response)
    orders             = step.extract_dict_field(data=parsed.output, field="orders")
    customers          = step.extract_dict_field(data=parsed.output, field="customers")

    renamed_raw        = for_each(items=customers.output, do=lambda item: step.rename_dict_keys(data=item, rename_map={"id": "customer_id"}))
    renamed_customers  = step.map_values(items=renamed_raw.output, key="result")

    joined             = step.join_lists_on_key(left=orders.output, right=renamed_customers.output, key="customer_id")
    completed          = step.filter_dict_list(items=joined.output, key="status", value="completed")

    total_completed    = step.count_dict_list(items=completed.output)

    basic              = step.filter_dict_list(items=completed.output, key="plan", value="basic")
    pro                = step.filter_dict_list(items=completed.output, key="plan", value="pro")
    enterprise         = step.filter_dict_list(items=completed.output, key="plan", value="enterprise")

    basic_revenue      = step.calculate_aggregates(items=basic.output, field="amount", operation="sum")
    pro_revenue        = step.calculate_aggregates(items=pro.output, field="amount", operation="sum")
    enterprise_revenue = step.calculate_aggregates(items=enterprise.output, field="amount", operation="sum")

    return {
        "basic_revenue":      basic_revenue,
        "pro_revenue":        pro_revenue,
        "enterprise_revenue": enterprise_revenue,
        "total_completed":    total_completed,
    }
